Package org.eventb.core.seqprover.transformer

Interface ISequentTranslator

All Superinterfaces:
ISequentTransformer
All Known Implementing Classes:
LanguageFilter, SequentDatatypeTranslator, SequentExtensionRemover, SequentExtensionTranslator
public interface ISequentTranslator extends ISequentTransformer
Common protocol for translating simple sequents. This interface is an extension of ISequentTransformer that allows the translator to define the formula factory of the translated sequent, as well as to add some axioms to it.
Since:
2.6
See Also:
  • ISimpleSequent.apply(ISequentTransformer)

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Predicate[]
    getAxioms()
    Returns the axioms that, when added to the transformed sequent, make it equivalent to the original sequent.
    FormulaFactory
    getTargetFormulaFactory()
    Returns the language used in the sequent after is has been translated.

    Methods inherited from interface org.eventb.core.seqprover.transformer.ISequentTransformer

    transform

  • Method Details

    • getTargetFormulaFactory

      FormulaFactory getTargetFormulaFactory()
      Returns the language used in the sequent after is has been translated.
      Returns:
      the formula factory of the translated sequent

    • getAxioms

      Predicate[] getAxioms()
      Returns the axioms that, when added to the transformed sequent, make it equivalent to the original sequent.

      The axioms are put before all hypotheses of the resulting sequent. This method is called after all predicates have been transformed.

      Returns:
      an array of axioms
